subcodes.first_line: My tongue and My Pen bear witness that thou didst turn toward the Wronged One, clinging to His Name, the Self-Subsisting, and didst traverse land and sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد لسانی و قلمی بانک اقبلت الی المظلوم متمسکا باسمه القیوم و قطعت البر و البحر
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
